title: coronilla minima
intro: Coronilla minima, also known as the Least Coronilla, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Coronilla minima include its ability to soothe sore throats, relieve congestion, and reduce fever. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
